lineage: discovery-sampler probe 1 promoted to a generator
palette: held out (structure-finding only; 3-palette labeling is downstream)

esc_hist.note: fractions of escaped pixels, fixed edges

accept_band.note: retuned against run0 hand-labels (two-sided: interior<=40% + spread floor in confirmed 23..86 gap); centralized one-place default, flag-overridable; per-clause margins logged per keeper; fit to 50 frames, re-check per batch

descriptor: keeper-only feature (energy s16 sparse + nn_emd to corpus); NOT a gate
